metadata.description: yarr media-automation plugins: the full MCP server plus standalone, skills-only, no-MCP plugins for each service.

plugins.name: yarr
plugins.description: yarr MCP server for the media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Jellyfin, qBittorrent, and more) — one tool surface, plus all per-service skills bundled as a direct-HTTP fallback when the MCP server is down.

plugins.name: sonarr
plugins.description: Search, add, and monitor TV series in Sonarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, history, and quality profiles. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: radarr
plugins.description: Search, add, and monitor movies (and collections) in Radarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, quality profiles, and root folders. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: prowlarr
plugins.description: List indexers, run searches across them, and check indexer health and stats in Prowlarr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: overseerr
plugins.description: List, search, create, approve, and decline media requests in Overseerr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: sabnzbd
plugins.description: View, pause, resume, and manage the SABnzbd Usenet download queue and history via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: qbittorrent
plugins.description: List, add, pause, resume, and remove torrents and check transfer stats in qBittorrent via its WebUI API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: plex
plugins.description: Check server status, active sessions (who's watching), libraries, and recently added items in Plex via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: jellyfin
plugins.description: Check server status, active sessions, libraries, and items in Jellyfin via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: tautulli
plugins.description: Read Plex viewing activity, watch history, home stats, and users from Tautulli via its API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: tracearr
plugins.description: Query Tracearr's public API for media tracing and analytics. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

plugins.name: bazarr
plugins.description: Check wanted/missing subtitles for movies and series, list providers, and trigger subtitle searches in Bazarr via its REST API. Skills-only, no MCP server required.
